records.m_Talk_ENG: Guys, listen. I don't hear anything outside anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The C.O.s must have given up and left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The C.O.s must have given up and left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The C.O.s must have given up and left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heek...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heek...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heek...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stay close to the opposite wall, or we could all die together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stay close to the opposite wall, or we could all die together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stay close to the opposite wall, or we could all die together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying we should stay here? Don't you know how long we've been cooped up in this tiny place?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying we should stay here? Don't you know how long we've been cooped up in this tiny place?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying we should stay here? Don't you know how long we've been cooped up in this tiny place?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's be patient a little longer. We've missed quite a few regular reports. Help will be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's be patient a little longer. We've missed quite a few regular reports. Help will be here soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's be patient a little longer. We've missed quite a few regular reports. Help will be here soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Help?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Help?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Help?

records.m_Talk_ENG: From whom? Those paupers who can barely afford third-rate mercenaries like us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: From whom? Those paupers who can barely afford third-rate mercenaries like us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: From whom? Those paupers who can barely afford third-rate mercenaries like us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'd better call them clients if you want to stay in business.

records.m_Talk_FRA: You'd better call them clients if you want to stay in business.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, I'm not gonna! I probably couldn't do it even if I wanted to. Because I'm going to die here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, I'm not gonna! I probably couldn't do it even if I wanted to. Because I'm going to die here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, I'm not gonna! I probably couldn't do it even if I wanted to. Because I'm going to die here!

records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, unless it rains replacement parts.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I've been sending distress signals, but I doubt they're strong enough to make it outside the Corrupted Area.

records.m_Talk_FRA: That woman. She's with you, right? What's wrong with her? Why is she doing that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They probably think you're awesome. You're a modern-day knight in shining armor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We would have failed our mission if you didn't come to our rescue.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We would have failed our mission if you didn't come to our rescue.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We would have failed our mission if you didn't come to our rescue.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, then I want you to use my share to repair your broken gear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, then I want you to use my share to repair your broken gear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, then I want you to use my share to repair your broken gear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't save you because I wanted something in return. I only did it according to the mission of the order.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't save you because I wanted something in return. I only did it according to the mission of the order.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't save you because I wanted something in return. I only did it according to the mission of the order.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure you don't want anything? You're a Counter. Don't you at least want some Eternium?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure you don't want anything? You're a Counter. Don't you at least want some Eternium?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure you don't want anything? You're a Counter. Don't you at least want some Eternium?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We get enough financial support from our families.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We get enough financial support from our families.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We get enough financial support from our families.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, as you can see, we don't need a lot of things to fight, unlike some others.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, as you can see, we don't need a lot of things to fight, unlike some others.

records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The Zodiac Knights, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The Zodiac Knights, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've heard many bad and good things about you, and you're just as I've heard.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I've heard many bad and good things about you, and you're just as I've heard.

records.m_Talk_DEU: That's unexpected. I didn't know people said good things about us.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Why not?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you hate being treated like a clown by those beneath you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you hate being treated like a clown by those beneath you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you hate being treated like a clown by those beneath you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've heard that before, but I'd rather be a subject of mockery than of fear.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I've heard that before, but I'd rather be a subject of mockery than of fear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: People are not afraid of me even though I'm carrying a weapon that can hurt them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: People are not afraid of me even though I'm carrying a weapon that can hurt them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: People are not afraid of me even though I'm carrying a weapon that can hurt them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Heek...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stay close to the opposite wall, or we could all die together.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stay close to the opposite wall, or we could all die together.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stay close to the opposite wall, or we could all die together.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying we should stay here? Don't you know how long we've been cooped up in this tiny place?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Help?

root.m_Talk_ENG: From whom? Those paupers who can barely afford third-rate mercenaries like us?

root.m_Talk_FRA: From whom? Those paupers who can barely afford third-rate mercenaries like us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: In this line of business, nothing else matters so long as you've got skill. I can introduce you to a close colleague of mine if you want.

root.m_Talk_DEU: In this line of business, nothing else matters so long as you've got skill. I can introduce you to a close colleague of mine if you want.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In this line of business, nothing else matters so long as you've got skill. I can introduce you to a close colleague of mine if you want.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I appreciate the offer, but no, thank you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I appreciate the offer, but no, thank you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I appreciate the offer, but no, thank you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why not?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why not?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why not?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you hate being treated like a clown by those beneath you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you hate being treated like a clown by those beneath you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you hate being treated like a clown by those beneath you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've heard that before, but I'd rather be a subject of mockery than of fear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've heard that before, but I'd rather be a subject of mockery than of fear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've heard that before, but I'd rather be a subject of mockery than of fear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: People are not afraid of me even though I'm carrying a weapon that can hurt them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: People are not afraid of me even though I'm carrying a weapon that can hurt them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: People are not afraid of me even though I'm carrying a weapon that can hurt them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

root.m_Talk_ENG: As a knight, I believe I can raise my honor just by doing what I do.

root.m_Talk_DEU: As a knight, I believe I can raise my honor just by doing what I do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As a knight, I believe I can raise my honor just by doing what I do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, I'd better go. The others are waiting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, I'd better go. The others are waiting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, I'd better go. The others are waiting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's so young, yet remarkably mature.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's so young, yet remarkably mature.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's so young, yet remarkably mature.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I wonder what kind of training she received growing up...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I wonder what kind of training she received growing up...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I wonder what kind of training she received growing up...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems this world... It's not as bleak as I thought.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems this world... It's not as bleak as I thought.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems this world... It's not as bleak as I thought.
